evidence.message: §1 UTF-8 no BOM: 135 spec text files scanned, zero BOM
§1 RFC 3339: /version generated_at=2026-04-23T14:13:30.097Z (explicit TZ, ≥ms precision)
§1 ISO-8601 durations: 5 tokens across spec (unique: 2, e.g. [P30D PT5M])
§1 LF line separators: 75 git-tracked .json files at HEAD, zero CRLF in canonical bytes
§1 JCS (RFC 8785): 47 cases round-tripped byte-identically across {floats=15, integers=9, nested=11, strings=12}
§1 JWT clock-skew ±30s: 4 fixtures verified against handler-keypair + computed verdict matches spec — accept/iat-past-skew/iat-future-skew/exp-expired
§1 PDA window: not_after - not_before = 4m25s ≤ 15min ceiling
§2 normative refs: 11 entries, all pinned (RFC#, version tag, or digest marker present)
§19.1.1 release-gate: gate_version=1.0, 5/5 checks passed, signed_manifest_eligible=true
§4 single-agent baseline: conformance card advertises single-agent (no multi-agent declarations, no waiver needed)

§16 Cross-Interaction Matrix covers 6 failure-path markers: [A2A handoff during self-improvement BudgetExhausted Compaction during streaming Agent Card changes mid-session OTel exporter failure HandoffBusy]
§4 primitive coverage: all 13 core primitives (P1..P10, P12..P14) have ≥1 SV-* test in the must-map
§4 file-system-grounded: spec declares file-system as authoritative + DB-as-secondary-only rule
§4/§16 composition coverage: spec defines 2 key compositions (SI×handoff, compaction×streaming)
